headline: Haaland finally at a World Cup — Norway ends a 27-year absence
summary: Norway qualified for its first World Cup since 1998 with a perfect 8-from-8 qualifying record (sealed by a 4-1 win in Italy), powered by Erling Haaland's 16 goals. At 25, one of the world's best strikers finally reaches his first World Cup — drawn into Group I with France, setting up a possible Haaland-vs-Mbappé showdown.
angles: Best player to never play at a World Cup — until now?
Haaland vs Mbappé in Group I — who wins the striker duel?
Can Haaland drag Norway out of a group with France?
16 goals in qualifying — does he top the World Cup scoring charts on debut?
